$schema_note: Declarative repository security_and_analysis settings (BB-009). Apply via infra/github/scripts/apply-governance.sh --apply when remote + admin token exist.
notes: Secret scanning and push protection availability depend on repository visibility and GitHub plan / Advanced Security entitlements.
If the API returns 403/422, record the blocker; do not claim settings are applied.
Dependabot version updates are configured in .github/dependabot.yml; security updates are toggled here.
